commands.label: Dark Mode
commands.onCmd: osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to tell appearance preferences to set dark mode to true'
commands.offCmd: osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to tell appearance preferences to set dark mode to false'

commands.label: Wi-Fi
commands.note: Interface is usually en0, but may vary — run 'networksetup -listallhardwareports' to confirm.

commands.label: Open Home Folder
commands.note: Opens your home directory in Finder.

commands.label: Keep Awake
commands.note: Prevents the display from sleeping while running. Kill to allow sleep again.

commands.label: Network Toolkit
commands.content:
ifconfig
netstat -rn
curl ifconfig.me
networksetup -listallnetworkservices
scutil --dns
